FEAT-021 describes: bookmarkable node/project routes, combined cross-project views, project picker, commit log view. All of that is now in scope of the Svelte+GraphQL migration epic ddx-02d6142d, which has concrete implementation beads for:
- Stage 3.8: NodeContext + ProjectContext stores + root redirect (ddx-abec1110)
- Stage 4.1: project picker wired to GraphQL (ddx-ff3d8825)
- Stage 4.2-4.8: beads/documents/graph/workers/sessions/commits pages (ddx-8d93eacf/8aa70788/b899d0bb/927fd970/fa380e19/8aa70788/88d7a076)
- Stage 4.14-4.15: Playwright specs including combined node-level views

Closing as superseded. The migration epic is the execution vehicle.
summary: SUPERSEDED by ddx-02d6142d (Svelte+GraphQL migration epic). FEAT-021 URL scheme + combined views + project picker are implemented as Stage 3 + Stage 4 of the migration epic.
